summary: Vertical DHS video set to music with no speech and on-screen captions, of Secretary Noem's trip to El Salvador, Colombia, and Mexico. It shows Noem descending airstairs, posed portraits with Mexican President Sheinbaum, a roundtable with a caption about targeting Colombian drug cartels, and a closing slow-motion shot of an American flag with the caption 'WE ARE PUTTING AMERICA FIRST.'

script.scene: Shot of Noem in a white top, ball cap and sunglasses descending white airstairs into greenery; caption begins 'Secretary Noem reinfor...'
Posed portrait of Noem in a light blue suit standing beside Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum in a wood-paneled room; lower-third caption: 'President of Mexico Claudia Sheinbaum.'

Roundtable with Noem and officials beside a U.S. flag and an 'Operation Return to Sender' poster (TdA arrests in Aurora, Colorado); caption: 'In Colombia, our partnership is targeting drug cartels to intercept drugs at the source before they reach America.'
Another posed two-shot of Noem and Sheinbaum, both smiling, behind a vase of pink flowers in the wood-paneled hall.
Slow-motion close-up of an American flag against a sunset sky; large caption: 'WE ARE PUTTING AMERICA FIRST.'

notable_text: In Colombia, our partnership is targeting drug cartels to intercept drugs at the source before they reach America.
